data.title: 7 top public companies are now holding billions of dollars in Ethereum, making them the largest ETH investors.
data.description: Major companies trading in the stock market are increasingly acquiring substantial amounts of Ethereum, bringing in a significant influx of billions of dollars in ETH. These entities have become the top holders of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Costco beats Q4 revenue estimates with $86.16 billion, EPS of $5.87 surpasses $5.80. Membership fees rise to $1.72 billion.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ: COST) released its fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported Q4 revenue of $86.16 billion, exceeding analyst projections of $86.12 billion. Additionally, Costco's adjusted fourth-quarter earnings stood at $5.87 per share, outperforming estimates of $5.80 per share. Membership fees notably rose to around $1.72 billion from $1.51 billion in the same period last year. In September 2024, Costco initiated its inaugural membership fee increase of $5. For more details, the full article is accessible via Benzinga.com.

data.title: Qlarant Foundation awarded $450,000 grants to charities; Program provided 16 grants of up to $50,000 each.
data.description: The 2025 Program, organized by the Qlarant Foundation in Easton, Md., awarded a total of 16 separate grants during its annual Grantee Celebration on September 24, 2025. Each grant provided up to $50,000 to nonprofit organizations. The event took place at the foundation's headquarters and aimed to recognize the contributions of these 16 grantees.

data.title: Desert Harvest launches human-identical Lactoferrin for menopause supported by effera™ protein.
data.description: Helaina Biotech has selected Desert Harvest to introduce effera™, a unique milk protein supporting hormone, immune, and vaginal health, to the menopause industry. The collaboration, announced on September 26, 2025, in Colorado Springs, marks a pioneering move in the market. Desert Harvest, known for its expertise in pelvic health, is set to leverage this breakthrough ingredient to offer innovative solutions.

data.title: Youxin Technology Ltd faces Nasdaq delisting due to low stock price. Plans to appeal. 1-for-80 share consolidation announced.
data.description: Youxin Technology Ltd, a SaaS and PaaS provider based in Guangzhou, China, received a staff determination notice from Nasdaq on September 22, 2025, stating the delisting of the Company's securities under Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A)(iii). The reason cited was the closing bid price of the Company’s Class A ordinary shares being below $0.10 for ten consecutive trading days, a violation known as the "Low Priced Stocks Rule". Unless an appeal is made, the securities will be suspended from trading on Nasdaq at the opening of business on October 1, 2025. This delisting notice could potentially lead to the filing of Form 25-NSE with the SEC, resulting in the removal of the Company’s securities from the Nasdaq Stock Market.

data.title: Morgan Stanley to send out participation notifications.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 4.2% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Advanced economies are projected to grow by 5.1% this year, while emerging markets and developing economies are anticipated to grow by 6.0%. Despite the overall positive outlook, uncertainties surrounding vaccine distribution, virus mutations, and uneven economic recoveries across regions could pose risks to this forecast. Additionally, global trade volumes are estimated to have declined by about 9.2% in 2020, with a projected recovery of 7.2% in 2021. The report emphasizes the importance of continued policy support and international cooperation to ensure a sustainable and inclusive recovery for all countries.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® to host 30th Annual MORE THAN PINK Walk in San Diego, aiming to raise $700,000 for breast cancer mission.
data.description: In San Diego, Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization globally, will host the 2025 San Diego MORE THAN PINK Walk, bringing together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and allies. This event, marking the 30th year of the walk in San Diego, aims to raise $700,000 for Komen's mission. The funds raised are crucial for Komen to continue its efforts in supporting those affected by breast cancer.

data.title: TD SYNNEX beats Q3 expectations with $15.65B revenue (6.6% ↑ YoY) and $3.58 earnings per share (25.2% ↑ YoY). PM optimistic.
data.description: TD SYNNEX (NYSE: SNX) released their third-quarter results, surpassing expectations with $15.65 billion in revenue, a 6.6% increase from the previous year's $14.69 billion. The company reported adjusted earnings of $3.58 per share, exceeding the anticipated $3.05 per share and marking a 25.2% growth from last year's $2.86 per share. CEO Patrick Zammit attributed the success to strong team execution and a unique go-to-market strategy. This performance set new company records for non-GAAP gross billings and diluted earnings per share.

data.title: Rosa Mexicano opens new location at Empire Hotel – bringing bold flavors and award-winning cocktails.
data.description: Renowned Mexican restaurant, Rosa Mexicano, known for its vibrant flavors and award-winning cocktails, has introduced a new modern and lively dining space in New York. The beloved dining destination, celebrated for its bold Mexican cuisine, has brought its renowned fiesta-forward atmosphere to the city. This transformation showcases a fresh take on their traditional dining experience, offering patrons a vibrant and modern setting to enjoy their flavorful dishes. The new space in New York promises to deliver the same exceptional quality and vibrant experience that Rosa Mexicano is known for. This transformation is part of the company's ongoing efforts to expand its reach and cater to a wider audience.

data.title: Rakuten Viki launches K-Drama Day ad campaign with Will Poulter & Victoria Justice. Asian entertainment promotion.
data.description: Today in San Francisco, on September 26, 2025, Rakuten Viki, a prominent platform for Asian entertainment, launched a fresh marketing initiative featuring Will Poulter from "The Bear" and "Guardians of the Galaxy," as well as Victoria Justice, known for her roles in "Zoey 101" and "Victorious." This campaign aims to promote the brand and engage audiences, leveraging the popularity of the mentioned stars.

data.title: Aerotek accepting applications for Summer 2026 intern program in various industries.
data.description: In Hanover, Maryland on September 26, 2025, Aerotek, a prominent workplace solutions provider for various industries such as manufacturing, logistics, construction, aviation, facilities, and maintenance, has commenced accepting applications for the Summer 2026 Ascend at Aerotek Internship Program. This program is specifically tailored for college students seeking hands-on experience in the field, offering valuable training and insight into the industry.

data.title: VyStar Credit Union wins 2025 Finovate Award for Savings Challenge; $5 million saved, impacting 31,000.
data.description: A financial institution in Jacksonville, Florida, VyStar Credit Union, has successfully saved over $5 million through their financial education programs and community empowerment initiatives. Their efforts were recognized with the 2025 Finovate Excellence in Sustainability Award for their Savings Challenge, which benefited over 31,000 individuals.

data.title: High Tide listed in Top Growing Companies in Canada for 5th year, ranked at No. 182 in 2025.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 26, 2025, High Tide Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol HITI, TSXV under HITI, and FSE under 2LYA, revealed it secured the 182nd position in a recent ranking. The company, known for its focus on retail and cannabis, aims to provide substantial benefits in various aspects of the industry.

data.title: Global computer-aided engineering market to hit US$23.44 billion by 2031 with 11.9% CAGR growth, as per Insight Partners report.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, a recent report released by The Insight Partners revealed substantial growth in the global computer-aided engineering market. This growth can be attributed to the increasing demand for cloud-based computer-aided engineering solutions. The report provides a detailed analysis of the market trends and forecasts promising prospects for the sector. The global computer-aided engineering market is projected to experience significant expansion in the coming years, with revenue expected to reach impressive figures.
